untranslatable_reason: This signal requires detection of: (1) ex-dividend date of underlying stock, (2) call time value premium calculation (intrinsic vs market price), and (3) comparison of call vs stock pricing. None of these are available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also describes an options strategy (call exercise decision) rather than a price-based trading rule. Time value premium and dividend dates are fundamental contract properties, not price indicators.
translation_notes: Signal MCMILLAN_DRY_176 is a conditional options strategy requiring options-specific data (call premium decomposition, dividend schedule) and decision logic (exercise vs sell) that cannot be expressed using only price, technical indicators, and standard operators. This requires an options pricing module and fundamental data integration outside the scope of price-based backtesting rules.
